item.name: Get Server to Server OpenAPI tokens

query.description: integer, Pagination limit, Default 10
integer, pagination offsett, default 10

item.name: Get a Storefront Open API AuthToken

query.description: string, BC JWT token
BC channel Id. Do not use this is you don't have opened multi-storefront
string, BC customer group Id
int, Company purchase bc order id, allow you found company by bc order id
0: PENDING 1: APPROVED 2: REJECTED 3: INACTIVE 4: DELETED
BigCommerce customer id, this customer should be a B2B company user
extra field filter type. The search filter type allows for partial matches, while the exact-match filter type only returns results that exactly match the specified criteria.

Company query extra fields, you can use this value to filter the company list.(include extraInt1 ~ extraInt5, extraStr1 ~ extraStr5 and other customizable) This value may be passed into the custom extra field configured by the B3 team when you create the company. If you clearly know the correspondence between the custom extra field and the default extra field, you can use the default extra field filter to obtain data, Of course, you can also filter by key-value pairs passed into custom fields. eg. https://api-b2b.bigcommerce.com/api/v2/io/companies/?extraFields=extraInt1:1&extraFields=companyTax:un42
Is show extra fields in the response
Pagination limit
Maximum created timestamp
Maximum modified timestamp
Minimum created timestamp
Minimum modified timestamp
Allow: 'DESC', 'ASC'
Company purchase order id
Company query string

The response sorted by which field, Allowed values:
companyName
updatedAt

item.name: Convert from BC Customer Group into Company

body.raw:
{
  "poNumber": "bj256",
  "extraInt1": 42,
  "extraInt2": 42,
  "extraInt3": 42,
  "extraInt4": 42,
  "extraInt5": 42,
  "extraStr1": "don't panic",
  "extraStr2": "don't panic",
  "extraStr3": "don't panic",
  "extraStr4": "don't panic",
  "extraStr5": "don't panic",
  "extraText": "don't panic"
}

item.name: Get Companies of a Super Admin

query.description: US (the searchType should be 1); United States (the searchType should be 0)
The search type, 0: Get the country code via the input country name; 1: Get the country name via the input country code.
US (the searchType should be 1); United States (the searchType should be 0)
The search type, 0: Get the country code via the input country name; 1: Get the country name via the input country code.
